Note:

CIBIL Score "-1" means CIBIL Score of the Related Party not found in CIBIL Consumer Bureau

CIBIL Score "NA1" means Related Party is a Commercial entity and is not eligible for CIBIL Score

CIBIL Score "NA2" means typeof relationship is not valid

CIBIL Score "NA3" means insufficient data for fetching CIBIL Score of the Related Party

CIBIL Score "NA4" indicates that CIBIL Score of the Related Party couldn't be generated due to technical error or connectivity issues

CIBIL Score "-" means member has subscribed for Related Party Score but not selected the option during CIR enquiry

CIBIL Score "NS" means your institution has not subscribed for CIBIL Score. For subscription details, kindly contact your institution's nodal officer

Related Party Network Analysis

Your institution has not subscribed to Related Party Network Analysis. For subscription details, kindly contact your institutions nodal officer.
